mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NIA.TB_ALARM_MST ( ALARMNO, SYSNAME, EQUIPTYPE, UNIT, ALARMTIME, RECEIVETIME, ALARMLOC, ALARMMSG, ALARMLEVEL, LINE_NAME, insert_module_name ) SELECT NEXTVAL('nia.seq_alarmno')::VARCHAR, -- 시퀀스 생성 #{sysname}, #{equiptype}, #{unit}, #{alarmtime}::TIMESTAMP, #{receivetime}::TIMESTAMP, #{alarmloc}, #{alarmmsg}, #{alarmlevel}, #{lineName}, 'NiaEmsLinkageApplication' WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM NIA.TB_ALARM_MST WHERE SYSNAME = #{sysname} AND UNIT = #{unit} AND RECEIVETIME = #{receivetime}::TIMESTAMP AND ALARMLOC = #{alarmloc} AND ALARMMSG = #{alarmmsg} AND ALARMLEVEL = #{alarmlevel} ) ON CONFLICT (ALARMNO) DO NOTHING
